news.title:
Chalet Hotels initiates cost-saving measures amid West Asia conflict impact.
CEO affirms no slowdown in capex or growth plans for Chalet Hotels.
news.summary:
Chalet Hotels initiates cost-saving measures amid West Asia conflict impact.
CEO affirms no slowdown in capex or growth plans for Chalet Hotels.

news.title:
Chalet Hotels Ltd confirmed interest payment of Rs.3.1 crore on NCDs on 25/03/2026.
The payment was made to NCD holders as per the beneficiary list on the record date 10/03/2026.
news.summary:
Chalet Hotels Ltd confirmed interest payment of Rs.3.1 crore on NCDs on 25/03/2026.
The payment was made to NCD holders as per the beneficiary list on the record date 10/03/2026.

news.title:
Mindspace REIT pre-leases 5.3 lakh sq ft to Chalet Hotels for a luxury hotel in Hyderabad.
The Rs 350 crore project at Mindspace Madhapur campus is set to complete by Q4 FY28.
news.summary:
Mindspace REIT pre-leases 5.3 lakh sq ft to Chalet Hotels for a luxury hotel in Hyderabad.
The Rs 350 crore project at Mindspace Madhapur campus is set to complete by Q4 FY28.

news.title:
BPCL faces a ₹1,816.65 crore excise demand; plans to appeal to CESTAT. Chalet Hotels to invest ₹632.8 crore for a luxury hotel in Hyderabad by FY2029.
Lupin gets EU approval for its biosimilar Ranluspec. Concor, HFCL, NBCC, and Waaree Energies announce key projects across logistics, telecom, construction, and solar sectors.
news.summary:
BPCL faces a ₹1,816.65 crore excise demand; plans to appeal to CESTAT. Chalet Hotels to invest ₹632.8 crore for a luxury hotel in Hyderabad by FY2029.
Lupin gets EU approval for its biosimilar Ranluspec. Concor, HFCL, NBCC, and Waaree Energies announce key projects across logistics, telecom, construction, and solar sectors.

news.title:
Chalet Hotels gets approval for a 330-room luxury hotel and 36,255 sq.ft commercial space in Hyderabad.
The ₹633 crore project will be the company's third hotel in the city.
news.summary:
Chalet Hotels gets approval for a 330-room luxury hotel and 36,255 sq.ft commercial space in Hyderabad.
The ₹633 crore project will be the company's third hotel in the city.

news.title:
Chalet Hotels received a Rs.39.6 crore property tax notice from Bengaluru Authority.
The Karnataka High Court granted a stay on the notice pending the next hearing.
news.summary:
Chalet Hotels received a Rs.39.6 crore property tax notice from Bengaluru Authority.
The Karnataka High Court granted a stay on the notice pending the next hearing.

news.title:
Chalet Hotels expects robust growth after a strong Q3 performance, easing hospitality sector concerns.
Managing Director and CEO Shwetank Singh shared insights in an exclusive interview with ET.
news.summary:
Chalet Hotels expects robust growth after a strong Q3 performance, easing hospitality sector concerns.
Managing Director and CEO Shwetank Singh shared insights in an exclusive interview with ET.

news.title: Chalet Hotels' Q3 results show RevPAR surpassing 10K, signaling strong growth.
news.summary: Chalet Hotels' Q3 results show RevPAR surpassing 10K, signaling strong growth.

news.title:
Chalet Hotels' Q3 revenue rose 27% YoY to INR 5,892 mn, EBITDA up 29% to INR 2,726 mn.
Hospitality revenue grew 23% YoY; Udaipur resort deal pending due diligence with large capex planned.
news.summary:
Chalet Hotels' Q3 revenue rose 27% YoY to INR 5,892 mn, EBITDA up 29% to INR 2,726 mn.
Hospitality revenue grew 23% YoY; Udaipur resort deal pending due diligence with large capex planned.

news.title:
Chalet Hotels' Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹2.65B from ₹2.05B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin improved to 45.6% from 44.7% YoY.
news.summary:
Chalet Hotels' Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹2.65B from ₹2.05B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin improved to 45.6% from 44.7% YoY.

news.title:
Chalet Hotels reports strong Q3 results for Dec 31, 2025.
The company operates 11 luxury hotels and resorts with 3,389 keys.
news.summary:
Chalet Hotels reports strong Q3 results for Dec 31, 2025.
The company operates 11 luxury hotels and resorts with 3,389 keys.

news.title:
Chalet Hotels Ltd to hold board meeting on Feb 2, 2026, to approve unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window for securities remains closed until 48 hours post results declaration; reopens Feb 5, 2026.
news.summary:
Chalet Hotels Ltd to hold board meeting on Feb 2, 2026, to approve unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window for securities remains closed until 48 hours post results declaration; reopens Feb 5, 2026.

news.title:
India's travel sector is projected to grow 1.5-1.8x GDP, offering 10-12% annual growth opportunities for airlines, hotels, and e-travel.
Key beneficiaries include IndiGo (expanding fleet, strong EBITDA), Chalet Hotels (metro-focused portfolio), and Ixigo (market share in tickets).
news.summary:
India's travel sector is projected to grow 1.5-1.8x GDP, offering 10-12% annual growth opportunities for airlines, hotels, and e-travel.
Key beneficiaries include IndiGo (expanding fleet, strong EBITDA), Chalet Hotels (metro-focused portfolio), and Ixigo (market share in tickets).

news.title:
Union Budget 2026 sees industries like real estate, insurance, FMCG, and telecom pushing for tax relief, infrastructure support, and policy stability to boost growth.
Companies like Universal Sompo, CCL Products, ICRA, Chalet Hotels, and DSS Imagetech emphasize GST rationalization, housing incentives, and infrastructure-led growth.
news.summary:
Union Budget 2026 sees industries like real estate, insurance, FMCG, and telecom pushing for tax relief, infrastructure support, and policy stability to boost growth.
Companies like Universal Sompo, CCL Products, ICRA, Chalet Hotels, and DSS Imagetech emphasize GST rationalization, housing incentives, and infrastructure-led growth.

news.title:
Chalet Hotels saw a block trade of 274,403 shares at Rs. 868.5.
The total deal value for the block trade was Rs. 23.8 crores.
news.summary:
Chalet Hotels saw a block trade of 274,403 shares at Rs. 868.5.
The total deal value for the block trade was Rs. 23.8 crores.

news.title:
Chalet Hotels Ltd has fully redeemed Commercial Paper worth Rs.100 crore on December 22, 2025.
The repayment was completed on maturity, with no outstanding dues as of the redemption date.
news.summary:
Chalet Hotels Ltd has fully redeemed Commercial Paper worth Rs.100 crore on December 22, 2025.
The repayment was completed on maturity, with no outstanding dues as of the redemption date.

news.title:
Chalet Hotels issued Rs.100 crore Commercial Papers via private placement, rated CRISIL A1.
The CPs have a 3-month tenure with 6.3% fixed interest, listed on BSE Wholesale Debt Market.
news.summary:
Chalet Hotels issued Rs.100 crore Commercial Papers via private placement, rated CRISIL A1.
The CPs have a 3-month tenure with 6.3% fixed interest, listed on BSE Wholesale Debt Market.

news.title:
Chalet Hotels undergoes market reassessment due to mixed financial signals.
The company shows steady revenue growth but faces debt servicing challenges.
news.summary:
Chalet Hotels undergoes market reassessment due to mixed financial signals.
The company shows steady revenue growth but faces debt servicing challenges.

news.title:
Chalet Hotels acquires Udaipur resort property for Rs 171 crore.
The resort has 150 rooms; acquisition subject to net asset adjustments.
news.summary:
Chalet Hotels acquires Udaipur resort property for Rs 171 crore.
The resort has 150 rooms; acquisition subject to net asset adjustments.

news.title:
Chalet Hotels Ltd acquired 26% stake in Prozeal Green Power Fourteen Pvt Ltd.
The acquisition, worth Rs.26,000, enables participation in captive solar power in Maharashtra.
news.summary:
Chalet Hotels Ltd acquired 26% stake in Prozeal Green Power Fourteen Pvt Ltd.
